opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right arm went completely numb and freezing cold an hour ago, and the pain is absolutely agonizing.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The pain came on suddenly while I was watching TV and it just won't stop — my hand's gone white and cold and I can't grip anything.

symptom_narrative.onset: sudden — started about 90 minutes ago while I was sitting watching television
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour and a half and not letting up
symptom_narrative.character: severe, unrelenting deep pain, with the hand going numb and freezing cold
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: absolutely agonizing, the worst pain — I can't sit still, I keep pacing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the whole forearm and hand below the elbow on the right
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since it began and getting worse
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing I've tried helps at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: pins and needles that are turning into complete numbness in my fingers, and now I can barely grip anything with that hand
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can't use the arm at all, I can't drive, and I live on my own

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: irregular heartbeat — I've been told I have atrial fibrillation

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; cannot drive right now because of the pain and not being able to use the arm

objective_data_offered.value: my right hand looks waxy and white, and it's starting to go blotchy and mottled
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/self-video description over chat, not a clinician inspection

objective_data_offered.value: the hand feels perishingly cold to touch compared to my other hand
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: subjective self-report by touch, not an instrument reading

objective_data_offered.value: I can barely grip or move the fingers on that hand now
